svg.text: “the morning of our wedding, before anyone else was awake”

g.text: The hush before the aisle. Ivory and blu
sh opening toward the light — joy that sti
Keys still cold in the hand. Balanced gr
eens and warm neutrals for the threshold o
Fifty years, swept to one warm side. Cha
mpagne and burgundy with a statement ribbo
Scattered abundance for the season of ga
thering in. Deep greens and silver, ground

svg.text: Did this feel like your memory?
